shortDescription.text: Identified common development practices without malicious intent.

fullDescription.text: The analyzed code exhibits behaviors common in legitimate software development, such as making network requests, accessing environment variables, and using external libraries. These actions, in this context, are part of standard application functionality or educational content and do not indicate malicious intent. Threat intelligence has confirmed the legitimacy of the observed patterns and libraries.

message.text: The analysis of the skill's behavior, including network requests, environment variable access, and external library usage, confirms no malicious intent. Threat intelligence corroborates that these are legitimate development practices, presented in an educational context. No specific suspicious code lines were identified.
